name: food-ordering-system
description: Root package to run all microservices concurrently

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-user" "npm run start-restaurant" "npm run start-order" "npm run start-payment"
scripts.install-all: npm install && concurrently "cd api-gateway && npm install" "cd user-service && npm install" "cd restaurant-service && npm install" "cd order-service && npm install" "cd payment-service && npm install"
